parsed_review.summary: CP00-482 is a clean descriptor-only RP16 governance "workflow permission slice" pack (RP16.P01.M04.S07-RP16.P01.M06.S04, 40 units, risk B). Independent read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob only) confirms full internal consistency across registry.js, service.js, validators.js, model.test.js, the validator script, contracts/governance-core-contract.json, README, the pack manifest, and the closeout-pack-plan entry. Distributions match the prompt baseline exactly (deliverables implementation 22 / ui 6 / fixture 2 / test 6 / hermes_evidence 2 / claude_review 2; micro titles Secondary Workflow Slice 14 / Permission And Audit Binding 22 / Synthetic Fixture Set 4; phase RP16.P01 = 40). Every descriptor row (including the M05 Permission And Audit Binding rows) is descriptor_only with runtime_execution=false and raw_payload_included=false, and the no-write attestation sets all governance/DLP/retention/legal-hold runtime, permission-eval, audit-write, state-write, object-storage, hermes-runtime-receipt, command-runtime, and real-fixture-data flags to false. The contract descriptor is locked to the generated descriptor via deepEqual, tenant rows deny cross-tenant access, and matter_trace_required is enforced. Authority boundaries are intact: claude_is_final_approval=false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false; Hermes is used only as a deterministic evidence/gate packet (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false), not embedded in product runtime. The pack correctly does NOT assert production_ready=true (production_ready=false, status implemented_pending_review) — its supported claim is the descriptor-verified flag, backed by tests, the Hermes evidence packet (production_ready_candidate = coverage_valid && slice_valid), and the no-write/no-real-data attestation. Review-harness hardening evidence is valid: readiness auth preflight passed with non-zero, well-formed JSON stdout; tools restricted to Read/Grep/Glob; review schema present; no auth failure, 0-byte stdout, malformed/fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, or missing-field conditions. No real client/matter/payment data, secrets, PII, or TODO/placeholder content found in scope; unrelated dirty files (docx, workbook/*, ldip result, session handoff) are correctly excluded from pack scope. No P0-P3 findings. This verdict is an independent read-only review recommendation only; Claude is not the final approval authority and human final approval remains required for any enterprise-trust claim (handled outside this receipt).
